title: Authorize CoAP mutating resources
description: Discovered during project-LICHEN-m5m1 review. CoAP server resource registration exposes mutating handlers such as /config PUT and /msg/inbox POST without an implemented local-admin, transport access-level, or OSCORE authorization check. CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_SERVER_OSCORE does not currently enforce these handlers. Define and enforce authorization at dispatch/resource boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Every mutating CoAP resource has an explicit authorization policy. 2. Unauthorized mesh/local requests fail closed. 3. Authorized local-admin/OSCORE paths have independent request/response tests. 4. Read-only resources remain available per spec. 5. Three independent security review passes complete.
